records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion
records.m_Talk_VTN:
Sau nhi87
9u cu87kc tranh lu86{n, ng95pi 96e95s 96ei 96e8691n k8691t lu86{n,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.
records.m_Talk_VTN: v87mi s87 suy x959t k8785 c95png, ng98~87oi nh95rn vi95xn n95py l95p ho95pn to95pn c86wn thi8691t cho t98~98qng lai ph95{a tr98~87mc c87wa ng95pi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_VTN: r86ng ng95pi s8689 ch87an c9580 86uy, b86ut ch86up h86{u qu86s ra sao.
records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess you were also pretty bored to call me over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess you were also pretty bored to call me over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess you were also pretty bored to call me over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you have nothing to do, how about helping me with the bellows in the workshop? I think having a human apprentice who has outlived me would be fun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you have nothing to do, how about helping me with the bellows in the workshop? I think having a human apprentice who has outlived me would be fun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you have nothing to do, how about helping me with the bellows in the workshop? I think having a human apprentice who has outlived me would be fun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...? Why did I pretend to be older than you, knowing you were older than me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...? Why did I pretend to be older than you, knowing you were older than me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...? Why did I pretend to be older than you, knowing you were older than me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, you're right. I guess I forgot because the Family Alliance and Administration are full of young folks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, you're right. I guess I forgot because the Family Alliance and Administration are full of young folks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, you're right. I guess I forgot because the Family Alliance and Administration are full of young folks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Then maybe I'll set aside my embarrassment and act all cute like a young lady to you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Then maybe I'll set aside my embarrassment and act all cute like a young lady to you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Then maybe I'll set aside my embarrassment and act all cute like a young lady to you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mister... Why don't you roll up your sleeves to show off those dashing arms and join me in making an exquisite sword? Please, Mister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mister... Why don't you roll up your sleeves to show off those dashing arms and join me in making an exquisite sword? Please, Mister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mister... Why don't you roll up your sleeves to show off those dashing arms and join me in making an exquisite sword? Please, Mister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You like my original tone better? The young ones seemed to prefer this one. Guess you're a picky one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You like my original tone better? The young ones seemed to prefer this one. Guess you're a picky one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You like my original tone better? The young ones seemed to prefer this one. Guess you're a picky one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I like seeing your astonished face. Perhaps I will use it on you again later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I like seeing your astonished face. Perhaps I will use it on you again later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I like seeing your astonished face. Perhaps I will use it on you again later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. I might tease you, but I won't force you to strike the anvil with a hammer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. I might tease you, but I won't force you to strike the anvil with a hammer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. I might tease you, but I won't force you to strike the anvil with a hammer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have more important things to do than work at a blacksmith shop.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have more important things to do than work at a blacksmith shop.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have more important things to do than work at a blacksmith shop.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have incomparable years of experience. And you appear to have a gift for leadership, so there is no need for me to find you another talent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have incomparable years of experience. And you appear to have a gift for leadership, so there is no need for me to find you another talent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have incomparable years of experience. And you appear to have a gift for leadership, so there is no need for me to find you another talent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone acknowledges this. That's why I still continue to trust and follow you after all I've been through. It's been like this since you named us Gordias on your own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone acknowledges this. That's why I still continue to trust and follow you after all I've been through. It's been like this since you named us Gordias on your own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone acknowledges this. That's why I still continue to trust and follow you after all I've been through. It's been like this since you named us Gordias on your own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I look forward to being with you in the future, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I look forward to being with you in the future, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I look forward to being with you in the future, Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or... would you prefer that I call you "Mister"?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or... would you prefer that I call you "Mister"?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or... would you prefer that I call you "Mister"?
